status: PENDING RUN — scaffold only. No arm below has been measured. Do not publish these numbers.
prompt: verbatim natural (no format constraints) — identical to weather-bench
model_note: Re-baseline on the latest Codex CLI + its current default model on the run day. Do NOT reuse the Claude Opus weather-bench figures. Label the exact Codex version + model here once run.
headless_flags_note: Codex headless needs --dangerously-bypass-hook-trust + the sandbox flags on 0.139+. The 0.130 invocation silently degrades to baseline (hooks never fire) — which would fake a 'no uplift' result. Verify hooks fired before trusting any arm.

benchmark_a_directive.what: Does the /hydrate-yagni concision directive port to Codex? Same weather task, single shot, with vs without the directive.

benchmark_b_memory.what: Cross-runtime hand-off + cross-session reuse. The headline Codex story.

cross_runtime_handoff.protocol: Start the weather feature in Claude Code, /clear, resume in Codex. Codex's session-start read path injects Hydrate memory; Codex continues without re-explanation.
cross_runtime_handoff.gate: hydrate resume --project=<slug> must show the Claude session BEFORE the Codex reader runs (verify_capture). HYDRATE_PROJECT exported + verified.
cross_runtime_handoff.note: pending — this is the proven Claude<->Codex c8b leg (prior 1.00/0.90); re-run on latest infra for this page

compact_survival.what: Codex has no PreCompact event, so Hydrate IS its compact memory. Build, force a compact, verify recall survives.
